{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201611427E4CFD6AB8A14DD962A4"}"},"total":35},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7609367633688052504","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我很喜欢这个故事里的许三多，有血有肉，而且不容易出戏，这才是像草根成长成兵王的故事，主要还是希望弥补遗憾吧。而且我觉得这个人设挺好的，要是狂了吧唧的史今袁朗他们根本就不会喜欢许三多好吧？","text_exts":[{"e":13,"s":10,"text":"许三多","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%AE%B8%E4%B8%89%E5%A4%9A&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317739943024DD962A4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227609367633688052504%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227597475001947655230%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%AE%B8%E4%B8%89%E5%A4%9A%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771697311,"group_id":"7597475001947655230","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱看","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwp2YN3IFlZ8qRUSoc426e0RpbWoihefhRWQmWy+ZS4O","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7a59f038f1294f219eff56289f0ca60c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776532707&x-signature=OsxWHqfhSRTFh7EMthBhLNshAp0%3D","user_id":"2682461325626558","user_name":"菠菜卷辣椒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2682461325626558","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1714461187,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7597475001947655230","book_info":{"abstract":"【军旅+无女主+系统+补遗憾+成长+兄弟情+兵王+特种兵】
穿成许三多，开局落水，命悬一线。
系统降临：活下去，当最强的兵！
半年准备期，他从“龟儿子”蜕变成征兵干部眼里的好苗子。
可所有人都以为，这已经是他的极限。
直到新兵连结束，直到钢七连，直到老A选拔……
他们才发现，许三多的上限，根本没有天花板。
改变老马的颓废，拯救伍六一那条腿，成为所有人在战场上最信任的战友。
史今说：“我带出来的兵，是最好的兵。”
袁朗说：“这家伙，我第一眼就知道，他不属于任何地方，他属于战场。”
且看许三多，如何用这一世，活成真正的传奇。
【避雷指南】

1. 主角前期性格会保留原主的部分底色（如执拗、笨拙），是“带着记忆的许三多”而非“社畜扮演许三多”，介意这种渐变性成长的读者请注意。
2. 系统流爽文，有金手指（任务奖励、身体强化），但成长路径符合部队逻辑，一步一个脚印。
3. 尊重原著人物性格和命运走向，主要弥补遗憾（如老马、伍六一、史今等），不刻意抹黑任何原著角色。
4. 不谈恋爱，专注战友情、兄弟情、部队成长。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6b71f480cf7dd4da35955c3fee43ab94","author":"伊灿若","author_id":"","book_id":"7597475001947655230","book_name":"穿成许三多，从憨包成为最强特种","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7597714905608749630","read_count":"42479","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"252987"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"104","tags":"男频衍生,衍生,同人,系统,乡村,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3e900db82971714a930c8bbeeade9577~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779178302&x-signature=wPqRzF7FEqZrfLZ6kAiNDPRN3NU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4460049215285944","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"83"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201611427E4CFD6AB8A14DD962A4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_
